_comment: Inputs for S5.5 (Classical and Relativistic Limits) verification. All numerical values used in check scripts live here.

r_earth_moon.source: NASA Moon fact sheet — mean distance (semi-major axis 384,400 km)

earth_moon_force_reference.source: standard textbook value (Serway & Jewett, Physics for Scientists and Engineers)

m_g_provisional.source: GCM v2 H1 estimate using neutron-density packing proxy; see theory/versions/gcm_v2.md

c_causality._note: Per speed-of-causality-principle.md, c is the causality limit (graviton-substrate signal speed), NOT the photon speed. Photon speed v = c - 0_x < c.

m_gamma.source: GCM L1 claim; well below FRB dispersion bound ~2.1e-15 eV/c^2
